target.description: The product or company being launched (e.g., 'RouteForge')

budget.description: Budget constraint: bootstrapped, seed, series-a, or a specific dollar amount

description: Operational launch playbook from a GTM strategy — week-by-week timeline, channel tactics with keywords and CPCs, community targets, outreach scripts, founding customer program, budget breakdown, and milestone metrics. Depends on gtm-strategy upstream.
usage: launch plan, 90 day plan, go to market execution, operational plan, channel strategy, ad keywords, launch playbook, marketing plan, advertising plan, first customers plan
